methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $10M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $60M - $500M.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: Tenna Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Seed), post-money $60M

data.narrative:
Zeromark is a Seed-stage Defense & Security company that has raised $10M+ to date. The peer universe comprises ten private and two public companies operating in the same sector at comparable or adjacent stages, including Series A firms Stark Defence ($500M), Vatn Systems ($300M), and Ares Industries ($150M), alongside Seed-stage peer Tenna Systems ($60M).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis applied a 2.5x multiplier typical of Seed-to-next-stage advancement to the $10M raised proxy, implying a $25M valuation. Peer-median analysis used four same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables (Stark Defence, Vatn Systems, Ares Industries, and Tenna Systems) yielding a median valuation of $225M, with a range of $60M to $500M. The wide dispersion reflects heterogeneity in Series A funding outcomes within the sector.

Triangulating these methods produces a valuation range of $21M (low) to $259M (high), with a median of $125M. The substantial spread reflects uncertainty around whether Zeromark will track toward the upper quartile of Series A outcomes (evidenced by Stark Defence and Vatn Systems) or remain closer to earlier-stage peers like Tenna Systems. Key sensitivities include product-market fit validation, customer concentration in government contracts, and competitive positioning within the Defense & Security ecosystem. Stage-progression alone may underestimate potential given peer precedent; peer-median warrants discount for Zeromark's current pre-Series A position.
